name: TableCellProps
description: A cell within a table row.

children.description: The children of the component. A function may be provided to alter the children based on component state.

className.description: The CSS [className](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/Element/className) for the element. A function may be provided to compute the class based on component state.

colSpan.description: Indicates how many columns the data cell spans.

id.description: The unique id of the cell.

render.description:
Overrides the default DOM element with a custom render function.
This allows rendering existing components with built-in styles and behaviors
such as router links, animation libraries, and pre-styled components.

Requirements:

* You must render the expected element type (e.g. if `<button>` is expected, you cannot render an `<a>`).
* Only a single root DOM element can be rendered (no fragments).
* You must pass through props and ref to the underlying DOM element, merging with your own prop as appropriate.

style.description: The inline [style](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/HTMLElement/style) for the element. A function may be provided to compute the style based on component state.

textValue.description: A string representation of the cell's contents, used for features like typeahead.

columnIndex.name: columnIndex
columnIndex.description: The index of the column that this cell belongs to. Respects col spanning.

hasChildItems.name: hasChildItems
hasChildItems.description: Whether the parent row has child rows.

id.name: id
id.description: The unique id of the cell.

isDisabled.name: isDisabled
isDisabled.description:
Whether the parent row is non-interactive, i.e. both selection and actions are disabled and the item may
not be focused. Dependent on `disabledKeys` and `disabledBehavior`.

isExpanded.name: isExpanded
isExpanded.description: Whether the parent row is expanded.

isFocused.name: isFocused
isFocused.description: Whether the cell is currently focused.

isFocusVisible.name: isFocusVisible
isFocusVisible.description: Whether the cell is currently keyboard focused.

isHovered.name: isHovered
isHovered.description: Whether the cell is currently hovered with a mouse.

isPressed.name: isPressed
isPressed.description: Whether the cell is currently in a pressed state.

isSelected.name: isSelected
isSelected.description: Whether the parent row is currently selected.

isTreeColumn.name: isTreeColumn
isTreeColumn.description: Whether the column displays hierarchical data.

level.name: level
level.description: What level the parent row has within the table.
